Class WindowsDriverFactory

java.lang.Object
io.github.sentinel.webdrivers.WindowsDriverFactory

Author:
Sentinel Framework Creates WinAppDriver.

  • Method Details

    • startAppiumService

      protected static void startAppiumService()

    • createWindowsDriver

      protected static org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver createWindowsDriver()
      Creates a new Appium service and starts a new instance of WinAppDriver.exe associated to that service.

      Returns a newly created WindowsDriver as a WebDriver, based on the currently active page object and environment.

      Note: This method cannot tell if WinAppDriver.exe has already been started externally and will create a port conflict if it is already running.

      Returns:
      WebDriver returns a WindowsDriver<WebElement>

    • quit

      protected static void quit(io.appium.java_client.windows.WindowsDriver driver)
      Quits the WindowsDriver process passed to it. If this is the last remaining WinAppDriver running, the WinAppDriver.exe executable is also stopped.
      Parameters:
      driver - WindowsDriver<WebElement> the WindowsDriver to quit
